Metadata.title: GeorGeo Duck4 Solar | No.1 Premium Solar Roof
Metadata.description: GeorGeo Duck4 Solar — premium solar roof in Thailand. Professional team, quality work, proactive service. Request a quote and save on energy.

Footer.tagline: No.1 premium solar roof — we stand by you with a professional team, premium quality, and proactive service.

Home.heroSubtitle: We stand by you — a professional team with premium quality and proactive service.
Home.trustWithCount: Trusted by {count}+ customers — quotes saved securely in our system
Home.trustEmpty: Request a quote — your details are saved securely when you submit.
Home.sectionPoweredBody: Your roof can do more than keep the rain out — it can power your home with clean energy while looking refined. We combine engineering and design so you get performance you can feel, year after year.
Home.durabilityBody: Built to handle tropical sun and storms — ask us about materials, warranty, and how we tailor the system to your roof.
Home.efficiencyBody: We size the system to your usage so savings are meaningful, not guesswork — monitoring and support options available.
Home.systemBody: Panels, inverter, and installation work together — one team, one plan, from survey to handover.
Home.bottomCtaBody: Tell us about your home or factory — we’ll follow up with a clear next step.

Quote.title: Order
Quote.description: GeorGeo Duck4 Solar — upload your bill and roof photos for a fast, accurate assessment.

errors.name: Please enter your name

errors.bill: Bill amount must be greater than zero
errors.location: Pin your location on the map (search, tap the map, or use current location).

Map.geoTimeout: Location request timed out — try again.

Projects.demoHint: Showing demo images. In Vercel → Environment Variables, add NEXT_PUBLIC_PROJECT_GALLERY_JSON or NEXT_PUBLIC_PROJECT_IMAGE_URLS.
